message:
fix: add frankensqlite compatibility for schema checks and SQL queries

- Add fallback table probing in doctor command when sqlite_master query
  returns no results, enabling compatibility with frankensqlite which may
  not support querying sqlite_master directly. The fallback individually
  probes each required table with SELECT 1 FROM {table} LIMIT 1.
- Replace four correlated NOT EXISTS subqueries with NOT IN equivalents
  throughout sqlite.rs (blocked_issues_cache lookups in ready-status
  checks, dependency chain deferred checks, and export hash filtering),
  as frankensqlite does not support correlated subqueries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
